description:
Offered: every semester
A small to medium sized ensemble, this jazz ensemble prepares works from various jazz genres and styles in combo and big band formats. Jazz band is open to all students with experience playing a band instrument. Auditions may be required. This course partially satisfies the ensemble requirement for music minors. Extra performances required.
Note: May be repeated for credit 10 times. 3 such credits can be counted toward one Gen Ed designation.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP, FA, IHIP
